plain_english_summary: Deterministic speech-prosody encoding lane with a public proof surface and current lane verdict FAIL.
commercial_wedge: For speech-technology and voice-analytics teams that need deterministic, reproducible encoding of prosodic features. Business value is auditability and reproducibility in speech analysis, but the lane remains blocked on retrieval closure.
technical_wedge: Deterministic prosody compression via delta + zigzag + varint + RLE + zlib pipeline applied to speech-prosody signals. PRO-C001 through PRO-C004 PASS, PRO-C005 PAUSED_EXTERNAL, PRO-C006 FAIL. Retrieval closure below threshold.
ideal_first_buyer: Speech-technology or voice-analytics infrastructure team needing deterministic prosodic signal encoding.
deployment_model: Python package (pip install zpe-prosody or editable install from source). FastAPI wrapper available via .[api] extra.
proof_anchors: PRO-C001 PASS: core codec round-trip fidelity
PRO-C003 PASS: prosodic feature extraction fidelity
PRO-C004 PASS: unit test and integration coverage
not_claimed: PRO-C005 PAUSED_EXTERNAL — blocked on external dependency
PRO-C006 FAIL — retrieval closure below threshold
family_position: Prosody-specific proof surface for speech-prosody signal domains. Current lane verdict FAIL.
